items.title: Home Depot: Resist The Temptation Of Buying The Dip
Home Depot Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
items.description: Home Depot Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day

items.title: Shares of companies within the broader consumer discretionary sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness after Fed Chair Powell made remarks at the Economic Club. Stocks across sectors may also be weighed down on trade tension fears after after the United States informed NVIDIA that it may require a license to export chips to China.
Home Depot (HD) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
items.description: In the latest trading session, Home Depot (HD) closed at $354.11, marking a -0.87% move from the previous day.
